'''Port Tarkin''' was the main [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] and [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Phelarion/Legends|Phelarion]]. It was named by [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Thalassa Tarkin]] after her beloved husband, [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], after [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|his death]] at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]].

{{City-stub}}
